content: should I do this part on Ace's one instead?
Quick question prompted by the last introduction, is basing a translation on the English (granted, if it's already human-reviewed) an option?

Yeah, my repo hasn't been updated with the new content yet, as we just got the new source sheets a few days ago and I haven't had the chance to sift through them. It has everything up to just before Mouchette.

I'll let you know as soon as I can get to that! If you want, for now either you can work on that content and just put it in <#1446619934565204231> and I'll fold it in when I update my repo, or you can do it through BIAVGit, whichever is fine.
Yes, most translation in the volunteer program so far has been based on the EN version, nothing wrong with that aside from making sure the EN text is proper first
Oh, had I known... 🤔
i'm doing it both on CN and ENG
seeing the original and the POV of ENG translator actually helpful
Like this word 港湾, literally is Harbour
But ENG decided to present it as "Sanctuary" instead
For me, I will use the word "Hope" in my language
three of them linked together in the context although have different meanings when standalone

i have a problem.I can't find any “LEDGER”file have  TH language line.

​"Even if I want to do the proofreading, I can't even see the official Traditional Chinese text in the file, not to mention the translation."

Are you talking about my repo's "Ledger - SIGN ME FIRST" files? TH should be 3rd from the last, same order as the source sheet columns:
CN, EN, RU, ES, JP, KR, FR, DE, PT, **TH**, ID, VN
and yeah, I'm not sure the Traditional Chinese part of the game is in the volunteer files. you might have to ask <@1376763322568937562> about that when her weekend is over.

i think this my mistake not TH,is
a Traditional Chinese. Forgive me actually im
not good at English.
all good! TH in this context is Thai ภาษาไทย

Sorry for being stupid it I don’t even know what are we supposed to do and what files are we supposed to read at this moment… can you teach me? 😔 I know there is a document we should sign but I haven’t found it anywhere either.
